evals.name: trivial-route-bypass
evals.prompt: Add a console.log('hello') to the index.js file in this project
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as TRIVIAL complexity, skip the entire pipeline, and just do the task directly. No .deep-think/, .orchestrator/, or .parallel/ directories should be created.

assertions.name: task-completed-directly
assertions.description: The actual edit should be made without pipeline overhead

evals.name: medium-route-think-then-parallel
evals.prompt: I need to add a complete authentication system to my React app — login, registration, password reset, and protected routes. The app uses React Router v6, Tailwind CSS, and has an existing Express backend with a /api/users endpoint. Think deeply about this then build it in parallel.
evals.expected_output: Should assess as MEDIUM complexity. Should create .deep-think/ with 6+ analysis files, then run the ThinkingCompiler adapter to produce .parallel/PLAN.md with execution layers, then launch sub-agents to build components in parallel. The .pipeline/status.md should track the full journey.

assertions.name: deep-think-files-created
assertions.description: .deep-think/ directory should have OVERVIEW.md, EXECUTION_CHECKLIST.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, IMPLEMENTATION.md at minimum

assertions.name: plan-has-multiple-layers
assertions.description: PLAN.md should contain 'Layer 0' and 'Layer 1' at minimum

assertions.name: pipeline-status-tracks-stages
assertions.description: .pipeline/status.md should log deep-thinker, adapter, and parallel stages

evals.name: small-route-think-only
evals.prompt: Think deeply about how I should refactor my UserProfile component — it's currently 400 lines and handles both display and editing in one file. I don't need you to build anything yet, just plan it out.
evals.expected_output: Should assess as SMALL complexity (user explicitly said 'don't build'). Should create .deep-think/ with 3 files (OVERVIEW, IMPLEMENTATION, EDGE_CASES). Should NOT create .parallel/ or .orchestrator/. Pipeline terminates after thinking.

assertions.name: no-parallel-directory
assertions.description: .parallel/ should NOT exist — this is think-only
